title: How to Use Gamma AI to Make Stunning Presentations
summary: Gamma AI is an AI-powered presentation tool that generates complete presentations from a single prompt, document, or URL in minutes. It automates research, structure, design, and revisions while offering editing via built-in AI agents, presentation modes, and export to PowerPoint, Google Slides, and PDF. The tool includes API capabilities for enterprise automation in sales, marketing, training, and reporting workflows.
writeup: Gamma.app is an AI presentation builder that generates slides from a one-line prompt, pasted text, an existing template, or an imported file or URL. The host walks through a live creation of a 15-slide space presentation, demonstrating how the tool generates an outline, applies a visual theme, and fills in AI-generated images in parallel with text. The through-line is time compression: the claimed industry baseline is 20 to 40 hours per month spent on presentations, and the tool aims to collapse that to minutes. An API layer extends the same capability to automated batch workflows such as sales decks and training content at scale.
key_points: Business professionals spend an estimated 20 to 40 hours per month creating presentations, covering the build itself, research, and supporting work; Gamma targets collapsing that to 2 to 5 minutes per deck.

Gamma offers four content-input modes (prompt, pasted text, template reuse, and file or URL import) and four output types (presentation, webpage, document, and social media post), with slide density controllable via minimal, concise, detailed, or extensive settings.
During generation the tool first lays down text and concurrently generates AI images in the background, so by the time a user scrolls through the deck the visuals are already populated.
A Spotlight feature in presentation mode reveals slide content progressively as the speaker talks, preventing the audience from reading ahead and losing focus on the spoken narrative.

The Gamma API enables automated use cases including batch sales deck creation, marketing campaign materials, HR training content at scale, and custom reporting, removing the manual-creation bottleneck entirely for high-volume teams.

Pricing runs from a free tier (10 cards, 400 credits) through Plus at $8 per month (20 cards, 1,000 credits), Pro at $18 per month (60 cards, 4,000 credits), and Ultra at $90 per month (75 cards, 20,000 credits), all billed annually.
